description: v0 page recovered (#361 FIXED). Test keyword blocking on v0.app. Also re-test qwen3 if #363 not yet done.

services.notes: v0 uses v0_json response type. Was BLANK_PAGE in #353, FIXED in #361. h2_hold=1, h2_mode=2.
